summary: Diff shows frontend report display now uses a shared operator-hours formatter, and backend introduces a migration module and wires it into the actor. However, the diff summary does not provide evidence that backend operator-hours computation/storage logic was updated to match the frontend’s threshold and fractional-precision rules, which is central to REQ-5/REQ-6.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the Total Operator Hours value stored on each ProductionEntry in the backend matches the Total Operator Hours value calculated and shown in the Data Entry form, so that the Reports table/exported reports display the exact same operator-hours value for the same entry.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary shows a frontend display/formatter change in ReportsViewer, but does not show any backend changes to how ProductionEntry.totalOperatorHours is computed and stored when creating new entries. Without backend computation changes, stored values may still differ from the form’s calculation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Align backend operator-hours business logic with the frontend operator-hours utility (≤10h uses 10-hour target, >10h uses 12-hour target; compute with fractional minutes/seconds; deduct 30 minutes only when raw duration is <12h).
missing_requirements.reason: Although the frontend utility file reflects the stated rules, the diff summary does not show corresponding backend logic updates in backend/main.mo to apply the same threshold rule, fractional precision, and strict <12h lunch deduction when persisting entries.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated; no matching backend calculation code shown)

hallucinated_features.description: Added a backend migration module and wired migration.run into the canister actor.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly prefers no backend schema/state-shape migration unless strictly required, and the request focuses on computation logic changes when creating entries. The diff adds backend/migration.mo and includes it in backend/main.mo, which is not clearly required by REQ-5/REQ-6 based on the provided diff summary.
